allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.main import app; print\('Backend OK —', app.title\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.routers.weather_route import router; print\([r.path for r in router.routes]\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.services.weather_service import get_weather_for_waypoints; from app.routers.weather_route import router; print\('OK — routes:', [r.path for r in router.routes]\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.services.weather_service import _classify; r = [_classify\(c,p\)[:3] for c,p in [\(80,20\),\(80,50\),\(95,90\),\(0,0\),\(63,30\),\(63,60\)]]; print\(r\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.services.weather_service import get_weather_for_waypoints; from app.config import settings; print\('OK, weatherapi_key field exists:', 'weatherapi_key' in settings.model_fields\)")
